findings.description: Attribute names `title` and `target` (first-column property names from the attribute table) are absent from the hints list. The hints cover `messageеұһжҖ§`, `conditionеұһжҖ§`, `stopеұһжҖ§`, and `revertеұһжҖ§` but omit `titleеұһжҖ§` and `targetеұһжҖ§`.
